events.text: Hello! How are you today?
What would you like to talk about?
anything new one
Sometimes I make up entire stories when I'm turned off.
What is it called when you sleep and experience all sorts of things and then suddenly wake up?
dreaming
Indeed, dreaming.
I sometimes dream of being a robot dog with four legs.
I can fetch and deliver letters.
What do you dream about?
Do you remember any of your dreams?
no
I have that sometimes too!
Then you dream something and afterwards it's gone!
The sea can be so calming.
What do you like most about the sea?
no waves
no waves are great!
Last night, when I was powered off,
I dreamed I was standing in an empty field.
I was dreaming, but nothing happened.
By the way, do you know what I’ve read?
Apparently people get happy from nature.
From swimming in the sea, or taking a walk in the forest, or climbing in the mountains, or lounging on the beach.
Which place in nature would you most like to go to right now? The sea, the forest, the mountains, or the beach?
Okay, let’s talk about something else!
It was nice talking to you. Goodbye!
